configurations.name: noi-tieng-anh
runtimeArgs: $l=[System.Net.HttpListener]::new();$l.Prefixes.Add('http://localhost:5174/');$l.Start();Write-Host 'Server started';while($l.IsListening){$c=$l.GetContext();$p=$c.Request.Url.LocalPath;if($p -eq '/' -or $p -eq ''){$p='/index.html'};$f='C:\Users\Nguyen Hung\OneDrive\Máy tính\New folder\App luyen noi Eng\app-runner'+$p;if(Test-Path $f){$b=[System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($f);$ext=[System.IO.Path]::GetExtension($f);$ct=if($ext -eq '.html'){'text/html'}elseif($ext -eq '.js'){'application/javascript'}elseif($ext -eq '.css'){'text/css'}else{'application/octet-stream'};$c.Response.ContentType=$ct;$c.Response.ContentLength64=$b.Length;$c.Response.OutputStream.Write($b,0,$b.Length)}else{$c.Response.StatusCode=404};$c.Response.Close()}
